summary: Downgraded public import Cslib.Init to plain import in 3 Foundations/Logic files (Connectives, InferenceSystem, FrameConditions) and added compensating import Cslib.Init to 12 downstream files (7 more than the plan's 5, discovered during build verification). Build and lake shake verified clean.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary documenting all 4 phases: 12 compensating imports, 3 downgrades, build verification, shake verification
